narrative.headline: What 2020 Acura Rdx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 338 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility/Wiper (25% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Rear windshield shattered while parked in my drive way. Vehicle was not being driven. I have read several reports of this happening to other Acura rdx. I have contacted the dealership and Acura who have both told me I need to pay out of pocket to get this fixed. This is an Acura
